programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When the 14th precinct is assigned another female detective Mary Beth and Chris dont agree on whether shes qualified to be there or not

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: In this double episode after a ships purser is murdered Starsky and Hutch pose as onboard entertainment directors Hack Zack to unravel a mystery involving cocaine the syndicate and a homicide witness who may not be who she appears to be During their travels they contend with the Bayside Singles Club explosives Huggerini the Incredible and a chase with a dune buggy

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke is reluctant to accept a temporary assignment to his old Air Force test pilots unit in order to identify the traitor who is expected to fly a novel aircraft from Alaska to Siberia He accepts with Dominic undercover as cleaner learning about half-blood orphan boy Ho Minh Truong whom the KGB took as bargaining chip to blackmail the US presumed father Hawke believes he sired it with mother Nhi Houng but she maintains the father is his old Vietnam war buddy major Sam Roper who now commands the unit and becomes prime suspect Hawke makes a deal the boy for Airwolf or preventing the treason then takes over the flight and delivers nothing but destruction to the Soviets on their own airfield while rescuing the kid

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A mysterious teacup gives an elderly woman the power of eternal youth -- at a cost

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a green energy bio-diesel vehicle Froys lack of knowledge of the vehicles specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze - and when his error causes it to explode he and Matt abandon buildersowners Mickie and Joey in the middle of the desert

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift but a language barrier causes chaos Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and George MacMichael compete to win the fishing contest The only problem is that both of them are better at cheating than fishing

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Theres a noisy new neighbor in the hood and her name is Zsa Zsa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols dad comes to visit for the first time and Mister Ed has a hot date so he visits the local car wash to get a good shower

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A friend of Lucas is found murdered and robbed Suspicion falls on an ex-con and a lynching seems inevitable

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaws take Mark hostage in order to force Lucas to help them rob the bank in North Fork

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E18 The Renegades
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E18 The Renegades

programme.title: Bonanza 324
programme.desc: Bonanza 324

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West is assigned to protect Judge MGuigan who is presiding at a convention of Federal Judges A case of stolen dynamite has been traced to the convention hotel West suspects Zeno Baroda a clock-making bomber who was recently paroled

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: As a posse of sheriff deputies pursue Dr Kimble on foot in the desert he is rescued by outlaw bikers who want to use him to settle a score with local law enforcement

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike investigates reports of a sea monster which is literally causing whales to leap into the air above the oceans surface

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.desc: Knight 315

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A cracked mirror threatens to suck Micki and Ryan into the underworld

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A tormented young artist freaks when his latest cartoon The Phantom leaps from the page to do his bidding Meanwhile after undergoing a traumatic experience a claustrophobic is driven to the brink of madness

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa Luke Kate Hassie and Little Luke McCoy travel from Smokey Corners West Virginia to California They take over an inherited farm and everyone loves it but Grandpa who has trouble adjusting to the new place

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is going to stop Smart from testifying against one of their agents

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must hold a séance to get information from a dead informer

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As Hogan tries to help a German scientist defect bumbling Colonel Crittendon interferes again

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalters sister

programme.title: Mchale 318
programme.desc: Mchale 318

programme.title: Mchale 335
programme.desc: Mchale 335

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper believes that Gilligan has found The Eye of the Idol which gives him three wishes before sundown However the Professor believes it is just a silly superstition and just an ordinary cats eye

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A blow to the head gives the Skipper amnesia The Professor tries to cure him through hypnosis but he winds up believing that the other castaways are Japanese soldiers

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a researcher is kidnapped in a South American country by an old adversary of Jonathans he undertakes to personally deliver the ransom and ensure the safety of the researcher and his pregnant wife

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is set to star in a home video version of his self-help plumbing book but the director decides he lacks charisma and replaces him with an actor who knows nothing about plumbing

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Georges only living relative his boorish cousin Eugene comes to visit

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Depressed over a failed bill in congress that would have allowed women to serve in combat -- a life-long dream of hers Gunny makes some drastic changes in her life including dying her hair bright blonde

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Destiny annoys Mitch and Garner by relating her visions of a series of murders they are investigating until she sees that Ryan is the next victim

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job A confrontation with construction workers goes bad and somebodys vehicle will get destroyed

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police captain William Boone is asked to join the security team of Companion Daan of the Taelon an alien race that came to earth three years ago

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an injured escapee from a mental hospital arrives at Will and Tressas door after running into Alec he claims to be an alien on a mission Hes obviously insane - or is he

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as the wife of an archaeologist with a serious heart condition He needs to be rescued and an assassination plot needs to be foiled

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Deep Space
programme.desc: A spaceship with a hideous monster with an incredible appetite for flesh crashes to Earth Unsuspecting policemen Ian Mclemore and Jerry Merris investigate the wreckage They discover several small pods which they remove

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.title: Filler

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 27 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battleit out in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Shane Ryan; Tyler Kneiss vs. Rick Pfeifer; Zach Snider vs. Josh Eggie.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.
